HOW_TO_PLAY.TITLE: 📖 How to Play Flip & Whiz
HOW_TO_PLAY.STEP_1_DESC: Click the Start Game button to begin.
HOW_TO_PLAY.STEP_2_DESC: Select 1, 3, or 5 minutes. Feeling brave? Try Sudden Death, where a single wrong answer ends the game instantly!
HOW_TO_PLAY.STEP_3_DESC: Master a specific topic like History or Science, or choose Mixed (All) to face questions from every category.
HOW_TO_PLAY.STEP_4_DESC: Enter a player name (3 to 10 characters, Latin letters/numbers only) so we can record your legacy.
HOW_TO_PLAY.STEP_5_DESC: Answer correctly to earn points! But be careful: a wrong answer costs 5 points. Need help? Use a Hint (-2 pts) or Skip the card entirely (-3 pts).
HOW_TO_PLAY.STEP_6_DESC: When the game ends, see your total points and discover your global rank for your chosen mode and category!
